zh.Of,Henin Lietard,Pas-De-Calais,France: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特
zh.Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, France: 法國帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特
zh.Hénin-Beaumont, Liétard, Pas-de-Calais,: 法國帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard於1465年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特時，她的父親Heer Pieter van Hénin Heer van Boussu32歲，母親Isabeau de Lalaing35歲。她於1481年與Jean de Barbancon在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Of,Henin Lietard,Pas-De-Calais,France: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特

zh-hans.Hénin-Beaumont, Liétard, Pas-de-Calais,: 法国帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard于1465年出生在法国帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特时，她的父亲Heer Pieter van Hénin Heer van Boussu32岁，母亲Isabeau de Lalaing35岁。她于1481年与Jean de Barbancon在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gabrielle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Gabriel  , now well established in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard was born in 1465, in Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Heer Pieter van Hénin Heer van Boussu, was 32 and her mother, Isabeau de Lalaing, was 35. She married Jean de Barbancon in 1481, in Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard est née en 1465, à Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Heer Pieter van Hénin Heer van Boussu, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabeau de Lalaing, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Barbancon en 1481, à Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard 1465 in Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heer Pieter van Hénin Heer van Boussu 32 und ihre Mutter Isabeau de Lalaing 35. Sie hat 1481 in Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Jean de Barbancon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard è nata il nel 1465 nel Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Heer Pieter van Hénin Heer van Boussu, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Isabeau de Lalaing, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Barbancon nel 1481, nel Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétardが1465年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスheニン-ベアウモントで生まれた時，父Heer Pieter van Hénin Heer van Boussuは32歳，母Isabeau de Lalaingは35歳であった。1481年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスheニン-ベアウモントでJean de Barbanconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard(이)가 1465년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 he닌-보몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heer Pieter van Hénin Heer van Boussu(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabeau de Lalaing(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1481년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 he닌-보몽에서 Jean de Barbancon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard nasceu em 1465, em Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Heer Pieter van Hénin Heer van Boussu, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabeau de Lalaing, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Barbancon em 1481, em Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard родилась в 1465 г. в местности хeнин-бомонт, пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Heer Pieter van Hénin Heer van Boussu было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabeau de Lalaing, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Barbancon в 1481 г. в местности хeнин-бомонт, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard nació en 1465, en Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Heer Pieter van Hénin Heer van Boussu, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabeau de Lalaing, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Jean de Barbancon en 1481, en Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
